dag_desc: Codebase hygiene sweep: remove dead code from chain-terminal aftermath, fix broken validators, clean test directory, prune orphaned modules. Zero new features — strictly cleanup and correctness.

tasks.desc: Remove 14 unused imports from bin/roadmap.ts: order, batchConflicts, readyNodes, nextBatch, criticalPath, reconcile, validateGraph, consumeArtifact, crossOrient, discoverDependencies, resolveSiblingPath, enrichIntentGate, buildScaffold, ensureIndexExists. Remove dead loadDAG() function (~line 2058). Type check must still pass.

Remove terminal-audit as a live module. Delete src/lib/terminal-audit/computed.ts and src/lib/terminal-audit/detected.ts. Simplify validator.ts to not import them. Update terminal-brief.ts to not depend on runAudit/TerminalAuditContext — terminal brief should assemble context without calling audit functions. Remove terminal-audit test files from test/ directory (terminal-audit-e2e.test.ts, terminal-audit-validator.test.ts, terminal-audit-detected.test.ts, terminal-audit-computed.test.ts). Type check must pass.

Remove runtime-explore validator type from src/lib/protocol/validation.ts (lines 200-237). Remove the CDP observation mapping code. Remove 'runtime-explore' from ValidationRule union type in types.ts if present. @playwright/test is already removed from package.json. Type check must pass.

Fix stale-receipt detection in validateDagOrigin(). The test at tests/dag-mutator.test.ts:310 (currently skipped) expects validateDagOrigin() to return code 'missing-mutation-receipt' when mutations.jsonl has a receipt older than 60 seconds. Implement the detection logic and unskip the test.

Move 9 vitest-importing test files from test/ to tests/: advance-feature-branch.test.ts, intent-gate-e2e.test.ts, intent-report-validation.test.ts, report-validation-meta.test.ts, terminal-audit-computed.test.ts, terminal-audit-detected.test.ts, terminal-audit-e2e.test.ts, terminal-audit-validator.test.ts, brief-enrichment.test.ts. Note: 4 terminal-audit test files may be deleted by prune-terminal-audit instead of moved. Move the remaining 5. Verify they pass under vitest.

Implement artifact-schema validator in src/lib/protocol/validation.ts. Currently a stub that always fails with 'schema validation not yet implemented'. Use Ajv or simple JSON schema validation: read the target file, parse as JSON, validate against the schema file. If schema file doesn't exist, fail with clear error. Replace the TODO comment.
Terminal — full build, type check, and test suite pass. All dead code removed, broken tests fixed or deleted, phantom tests rescued.
